content: Port Penpot Clojure functions as pure TypeScript. Keep AGPL-3.0 attribution header. Place in src/shared/lib/geometry/. Interface Point = { readonly x: number; readonly y: number }. Functions are free-standing, not class methods. Test files in __tests__/ subdirectory.

name: Bezier regression test
description: When refactoring inline math to use geometry primitives, write a regression test that computes the SAME result both ways (inline original + library calls) and asserts they match. This catches porting errors at the function level.
cubicRoot(0) and perpendicular(point(1,0)) produce -0 due to IEEE 754
resolution: Guard cubicRoot with if (v===0) return 0. For tests: use epsilon-tolerant expectPoint helper, not toEqual (which uses Object.is, distinguishing -0 from 0).

name: Geometry module inventory
description: src/shared/lib/geometry/ — 4 modules: math.ts (15 fns), point.ts (30+ fns), rect.ts (20 fns), matrix.ts (20 fns). Barrel: index.ts. Tests: __tests__/ (176 total). Ported from Penpot AGPL-3.0 Clojure sources.
